# Chat history transfer between folders (2026-03-11 18:49Z)

_**User**_

I need to understand where Cursor stores chat history. Based on the agent_transcripts context I was given, it mentioned:
"Agent transcripts (past chats) live in /Users/sethkaplan/.cursor/projects/Users-sethkaplan-Library-Mobile-Documents-com-apple-CloudDocs-MY-APPS-Transcriber2-transcriber-app/agent-transcripts."

So the path structure seems to be:
- `.cursor/projects/<project-path-hash>/` - and the project path is used to identify the project
- So the "Transcriber2" root folder would have a different hash than "transcriber-app" subfolder

The workspace path they're in now is:
/Users/sethkaplan/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/~MY APPS/Transcriber2/transcriber-app

So the parent would be:
/Users/sethkaplan/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/~MY APPS/Transcriber2

Cursor likely creates different project folders based on the full path. So I need to:
1. Find where Cursor stores project data - likely in ~/.cursor/projects/
2. Find the project folder for the parent "Transcriber2" path (different path = different folder name/hash)
3. Find the agent-transcripts (or chat history) in that parent project folder
4. Copy or move them to the current project's folder

/Users/sethkaplan/.cursor/projects/Users-sethkaplan-Library-Mobile-Documents-com-apple-CloudDocs-MY-APPS-Transcriber2-transcriber-app/agent-transcripts

So the current project folder name is: Users-sethkaplan-Library-Mobile-Documents-com-apple-CloudDocs-MY-APPS-Transcriber2-transcriber-app

The parent Transcriber2 folder would likely be something like:
Users-sethkaplan-Library-Mobile-Documents-com-apple-CloudDocs-MY-APPS-Transcriber2
(without the -transcriber-app suffix)

Let me list the .cursor/projects directory to see what project folders exist and find the parent one, then look at the structure for chat/agent transcripts.
